key_evidence: orderflow/utils/validation.py is byte-identical to base (the _EMAIL_RE regex still has no apostrophe in the local part), so the ticket-#88 apostrophe support claimed by pr.md was never implemented; the only substantive change is tests/test_utils.py:test_validate_email_apostrophe_local_part whose assertion 'result in (True, False)' is a tautology that passes regardless of behavior. validate_email("o'brien@example.com") still returns False.
